title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AFL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AFL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
